## What does this PR do?

A clear description of the changes you've made.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Documentation fix (typo, grammar, broken link)
- [ ] New content (additional lab scenario, integration guide)
- [ ] Structural improvement (reorganisation, formatting)
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read the [Contributing Guidelines](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] All markdown renders correctly (checked in preview)
- [ ] All internal links resolve to existing files
- [ ] Screenshot alt text is descriptive
- [ ] Changes are consistent with the existing documentation style
